name: Load Shedding
short_description: Load Shedding - Bad Dudes have taken over the island and stolen all of the power, it is up to You to stop them!
detailed_description:
Load Shedding

Bad Dudes have taken over the island town of Moderio and stolen all of the power for their base. The Townsfolk have asked their local scientist Shaun Zenn to stop them.

You have to restore power to the town.
Build an electrical network by placing devices in the RED, GREEN, BLUE and YELLOW zones across the island. Connect the devices by clicking and dragging the small plugs to each other to form a wire.


Features:

3rd Person Character

Menu System

Battery Pack - A battery that has parameters such as maximum energy for charging and discharging. Looking closer, you can find out how much energy is left, and the time until it is completely charged.

Solar Generator - Implements sun tracking for each panel. If, for example, the solar panel is in the shade, then the generation of energy slows. Sunlight is tested for each of the 18 panels.

Wind Generator - Checks the current wind speed and adjusts the charge

Hydro Generator - Checks the current tide speed and adjusts the charge

Post - Large splitter

Small Post - Small splitter

Switch - You can separate one electrical line from another

Monitor - Through this connected device, you can find out all the parameters of the electrical network: The number of connected devices, the number of batteries, the number of generators, the amount of accumulated energy, the amount of energy to discharge, the time until all batteries are completely charged

Power Bank - All the features of a battery, but can be charged from other batteries

Backpack Powerpack
